Memory allocation and management implementation and interfaces for JerryScript, including heap and pool management.


## Files
- **[jmem-allocator-internal.h](jmem-allocator-internal.h.md)**: Internal header for memory allocator routines, including a function to free unused memory.
- **[jmem-allocator.c](jmem-allocator.c.md)**: Memory allocator implementation with functions for initialization, compression, decompression, and memory management callbacks.
- **[jmem-allocator.h](jmem-allocator.h.md)**: Header file for memory allocation in JerryScript, defining compressed pointers and memory management functions.
- **[jmem-config.h](jmem-config.h.md)**: Defines memory configuration constants for heap size and alignment in JerryScript.
- **[jmem-heap.c](jmem-heap.c.md)**: Heap memory management implementation with functions for allocation, deallocation, and statistics tracking.
- **[jmem-heap.h](jmem-heap.h.md)**: Heap allocator interface for memory management, including allocation, deallocation, and statistics.
- **[jmem-poolman.c](jmem-poolman.c.md)**: Memory pool manager implementation with functions for allocation, deallocation, and statistics tracking.
- **[jmem-poolman.h](jmem-poolman.h.md)**: Interface for a memory pool manager with functions for allocation, deallocation, and statistics.
